title: Buttery Creamy Midnight Mexican Hake Stir-fry
description: A keto-friendly midnight craving dish featuring creamy and buttery flavors with roasted hake as the main ingredient.
instructions: Cut the hake fillets into bite-sized pieces and season with salt, pepper, cumin seeds, and oregano.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the hake to the skillet and cook for another 3-5 minutes on each side or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove from heat, transfer to a plate, cover with foil, and set aside for resting.
In the same pan, add heavy cream. Reduce to simmering point and stir in butter until fully incorporated and slightly thickened.
Return hake fillets to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes on each side or until heated through and coated with the sauce.
Serve hot as a main course.
